name: Wunong Net Technology Company Limited
summary: Wunong Net Technology Company Limited, a holding company, through its subsidiary Wunong Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd offers online retail of foods products in China. It primarily sells green food, organic food, intangible cultural heritage food, agricultural products, and pollution-free products. The company sells food products through its online retail store. It also operates a restaurant under the Wunong Food Hall name. Wunong Net Technology Company Limited was formerly known as Advancement International Limited and changed its name to Wunong Net Technology Company Limited in August 2019. Wunong Net Technology Company Limited was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
